description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a robust, rounded reddish-brown carapace and eight segmented walking legs radiating outward. The upper shell is slightly domed and textured, with subtle color variations and some darker patches. Two prominent claws (chelae) extend forward, each with a distinct pincer shape and jointed segments. The underside is lighter in color, with a smoother, paler surface and visible segmentation between the cephalothorax and abdomen. Small, stalked eyes are positioned at the front corners of the carapace, and short antennae are faintly visible. The overall appearance suggests a naturalistic, edible crab commonly found in seafood markets or urban food displays.
description: A reddish-brown crab with a domed shell, eight legs, two large claws, and stalked eyes, featuring a textured carapace and lighter segmented underside.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the broad, domed carapace, both claws extended, and all eight legs splayed outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crab's narrow profile, visible segmentation underneath, and one claw raised above the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lighter, segmented underside, the attachment points of the legs, and the back of the carapace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other claw visible, showing the crab's body depth and the curvature of the legs.
